findings.message: D3 says ADR 2026-06-02-0716 D7 is only partially superseded: the blocking/no-bypass behavior remains valid when the gate is enabled, and the back-reference says the same. This consequence, however, says D7 needs a status update. Updating D7's status would imply the decision itself is superseded rather than partially amended, which conflicts with the stated design intent. Narrow this to cross-reference/follow-up wording rather than a D7 status update.
